security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: The universal DIG installer — digstore CLI + dig-node + dig-dns.
bundle.longDescription: The universal DIG Network installer. Installs the full DIG stack in one run: the digstore CLI (added to PATH), the dig-node local node, and the dig-dns *.dig name resolver — the last two registered as boot-start OS services. The DIG Browser is an optional add-on.
